summary_en: 750M shares (1.6% of S/O) authorized for acquisition up to ¥150.0B via open-market purchase on TSE from Jun 1, 2026–Mar 31, 2027. Share count to be adjusted to 37.5M post 5-for-1 stock split effective Oct 1, 2026. Rationale: support mid-to-long-term growth investment and flexible capital deployment aligned with cash position.
title_en: Notice regarding Acquisition Framework for Treasury Stock (Acquisition of Treasury Stock under Articles of Incorporation per Companies Act Article 459(1))
translation_en_brief: On May 29, 2026, Tokyo Electron's board authorized a treasury stock acquisition framework under the Companies Act Article 459(1) and the articles of incorporation. The company may acquire up to 7.5 million shares (1.6% of outstanding shares excluding treasury stock) for a total amount not to exceed ¥150.0 billion. The acquisition will be conducted via open-market purchase on the Tokyo Stock Exchange from June 1, 2026 through March 31, 2027. The board noted that a 5-for-1 stock split is scheduled for October 1, 2026, after which the authorized share count will be restated as 37.5 million shares. The stated rationale is to enable flexible capital deployment in support of mid-to-long-term profit growth investments while taking into account the company's current cash position and capital policy framework. Execution is not guaranteed and may be reduced or suspended depending on market conditions.
